_note: Instagram generic template: a single card with image, title, subtitle, and up to 3 buttons. IMPORTANT differences from Facebook: only 'web_url' and 'postback' button types are supported — 'phone_number', 'element_share', and 'account_link' are NOT supported on Instagram. Desktop is not supported; renders on mobile/app only. 'messaging_type' field is not used on Instagram. title/subtitle max: 80 chars each.
